para_trans: under the Revenue and Forest Department.
Posts in Registration and Stamp Department
about doing it.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
Government Decision Number: Establishment - 2023/1135 Q. No.239 / Stamp-1,
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk
Mantralaya Extension, Mumbai-400 032.
Date: 23rd April, 2026.
Read: - 1) Government Decision Number: Establishment - 2023/1135 Q. No.239 / Stamp-1, D. 4/12/2025.
2) Government Supplementary Letter No. Establishment - 2023/1135 Q. No.239 / Stamp-1, D. 9/4/2026.
3) Letter from the Inspector General of Registration and Controller of Stamps, Maharashtra State, Pune No. Ka-7 / Faith-4 /
4) Department of Finance, Government Decision No. 2/6/2015.
The Proposal: -
According to the old diagram of the Department of Registration and Stamping, under the Department of Revenue and Forestry.
Out of 3094 sanctioned posts, a total of 3952 posts have been created by abolishing 107 posts and creating 965 posts.
Figure Reference No. 1 here. This has been amended by the Government Decision dated 4/12/2025.
Thereafter, as provided by the Inspector General of Registration and Controller of Stamps, Pune,
Office-wise details of posts in the revised diagram are as under: Reference No. 2 here. 9/4/2026 of the day
It was approved by a supplementary letter.
According to the revised diagram of the Department of Registration and Stamps, Government Photo Registration
All technical positions in the office have been abolished, with the remaining international positions elsewhere.
It came to the notice of the Inspector General of Registration and Controller of Stamps, Pune, that the classification was necessary.
For this, the Inspector General of Registration and Controller of Stamps, Pune, has been appointed in all the offices under his charge.
Request for review of posts and as per requirement 60 posts to be transferred under the office Reference No. Here's 3
The letter dated 23/2/2026 has been received. Accordingly, the matter of transfer of these posts was under consideration of the Government.

Reference No. 4 is mentioned here. In the Government Decision dated 2/6/2015, the administrative division had no adverse effect on the administration, the total number of employees available in the division.
There is a provision that there will be full adjustment rights.
The Government's Decisions:
All technical forms in the Registration and Stamp Department, Government Photo Registry Office.

Since the posts have been abolished, there is a need to transfer the remaining posts of Internal (Assistant Accountant / Senior Clerk / Junior Clerk / Constable etc.) as well as other office posts as per requirement.
Considering this, the government is approving the transfer of 60 posts mentioned in the following table.
Government Decision Number: Establishment - 2023/1135 Q. No.239 / Stamp-1,
